heading: Increased penalties for drug-dealing in “drug-free” zones
label: 12521 Increased penalties for drug-dealing in “drug-free” zones
text: Pursuant to its authority under , the United States Sentencing Commission shall amend its sentencing guidelines to provide an appropriate enhancement for a defendant convicted of violating .section 994 of title 28section 860 of title 21
